query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM calls WHERE tenantId = 540044) as total_calls,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM call_grades WHERE tenantId = 540044 AND overallGrade = 'A') as grade_a,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM call_grades WHERE tenantId = 540044 AND overallGrade = 'B') as grade_b,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM call_grades WHERE tenantId = 540044 AND overallGrade = 'C') as grade_c,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM call_grades WHERE tenantId = 540044 AND overallGrade = 'D') as grade_d,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM call_grades WHERE tenantId = 540044 AND overallGrade = 'F') as grade_f;
